name: Alexion Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
description: Alexion Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a global biopharmaceutical company focused on serving patients and families affected by rare diseases and devastating conditions through the discovery, development, and commercialization of life-changing medicines. As a leader in rare diseases for more than 30 years, Alexion is pioneer in complement inhibition and has developed therapies for diseases such as paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria (PNH), atypical hemolytic uremic syndrome (aHUS), and generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG). In 2021, Alexion was acquired by AstraZeneca and now operates as its rare disease group.
